title: Le Loi and the Lam Son Uprising
summary: In the Lam Son mountains, the hero Le Loi gathered the people to revolt against the Ming invaders, regaining independence after 10 years of hardship.

slides.text: In the early days of the uprising in Lam Son, our troops faced many difficulties and a severe lack of food.
slides.imagePrompt: Le Loi and his soldiers in a dense forest, looking tired but determined, small camp fire, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.text: Le Loi and his generals swore an oath to work together with one heart at the Lung Nhai Oath ceremony to drive out the Ming army.
slides.imagePrompt: Le Loi and his generals performing a sacred oath ceremony in Lung Nhai, mountain background, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.text: Gradually, our army grew stronger, winning many important battles and forcing the enemy to retreat and entrench themselves in citadels.
slides.imagePrompt: Brave insurrection army charging towards enemy forts, high morale, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.text: According to legend, Le Loi received a magic sword engraved with the words 'Thuan Thien' (Heaven's Will) to fight the invaders and save the country.
slides.imagePrompt: Le Loi holding a glowing magic sword with 'Thuan Thien' text engraved, heroic pose, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.question: Where did Le Loi's uprising break out?
What is the name of the magic sword King Le Loi received?
